MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WO CHONG INC., DBA WO CHONG CO., INC. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WO CHONG INC., DBA WO CHONG CO., INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHO, CHAE CHAN  ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HEUNGBUNE KOREA N RESTAURANT DBA HAPPY HOUSE KOREAN RESTAURANT HYUN, YONG S.  ,AN INDIVIDUAL DBA HEUNGBUNE KOREAN RESTAURANT DBA HAPPY HOUSE KOREAN RESTAURANT $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,490.00, PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY TO THE COURT FOR AN ORDER ISSUING A JUDGMENT AS TO THE FULL OUTSTANDING BALANCE. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $600.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON AUG-15-2009 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
